title: Garden git history and context quality
goal: Continuously improve commit history quality while preserving deterministic decision traceability and explicit human control.

steps.text: Review target commit range and identify quality candidates (keep, squash, fixup follow-up, or drop proposal).
Classify each candidate with rationale, risk, and non-destructive alternatives.
Produce a proposal report with candidate commits, rationale, risk, and exact command plan marked pending approval.
Record each decision and proposed action in markdown, session-specific JSONL, and shared gardening JSONL logs using required fields.
Pause for review and approval before any history-altering action.
Apply only approved actions and re-run validation/status checks.

acceptanceCriteria: Candidate commits and decisions are captured with stable IDs
Proposal report is generated before any history-altering action is attempted
Session-specific and shared gardening JSONL entries satisfy required field contracts
No history-altering action occurs without explicit approval

verification.text: Confirm Docs/Development/git-history-gardener-proposals.md exists and proposal statuses are explicit
Confirm Docs/Development/git-history-gardener-log.md captures range, decisions, and review outcomes
Confirm Docs/Development/logs/git-history-gardener.jsonl entries parse and include all required fields
Confirm Docs/Development/logs/gardening-events.jsonl mirrors accepted decisions with shared base fields
Confirm git status and relevant validation checks are recorded after approved actions
